blocks.en: Wi-Fi 7 is the IEEE 802.11be amendment, branded ‘Extremely High Throughput’ (EHT). It doesn't reinvent Wi-Fi — it pushes the same ideas you've met to new extremes and adds one genuinely new trick.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 7 是 IEEE 802.11be 修订，品牌名为“极高吞吐”（EHT）。它并非重新发明 Wi-Fi——而是把你已学过的相同思想推向新的极致，并加入一项真正全新的本领。

blocks.en: The headline numbers: channels up to 320 MHz wide (double Wi-Fi 6), and denser modulation up to 4096-QAM (each symbol carries 12 bits instead of Wi-Fi 6's 10). Together these roughly double the peak rate before anything else.
blocks.zh: 标志性数字：信道宽度高达 320 MHz（Wi-Fi 6 的两倍），调制更密集至 4096-QAM（每符号承载 12 比特，而非 Wi-Fi 6 的 10 比特）。仅这两项就让峰值速率大致翻倍。

blocks.en: The genuinely new idea is Multi-Link Operation (MLO): a device can use two or three bands at the same time as one logical link. That's the next lesson — arguably the heart of Wi-Fi 7.
blocks.zh: 真正全新的思想是多链路操作（MLO）：一台设备可同时使用两到三个频段，作为一条逻辑链路。这是下一节内容——可以说是 Wi-Fi 7 的核心。

blocks.en:
mindmap
  root((Wi-Fi 7 / EHT))
    320 MHz channels
    4096-QAM
    Multi-Link Operation
    Multi-RU + puncturing
    R-TWT low latency
blocks.zh:
mindmap
  root((Wi-Fi 7 / EHT))
    320 MHz 信道
    4096-QAM
    多链路操作 MLO
    Multi-RU 与打孔
    R-TWT 低时延

blocks.en: Beyond raw speed, Wi-Fi 7 cares about latency and reliability: Multi-RU and preamble puncturing make better use of messy spectrum, and Restricted TWT reserves scheduled airtime for time-critical traffic. The rest of this track takes each in turn.
blocks.zh: 除了原始速度，Wi-Fi 7 还关注时延与可靠性：Multi-RU 与前导打孔更好地利用零碎的频谱，受限 TWT（R-TWT）为时间关键流量预留计划内空口时间。本轨道余下部分将逐一展开。

blocks.en: 802.11be defines the EHT Operation element (9.4.2.321) advertising the BSS's EHT parameters, and the Supported EHT-MCS And NSS Set field (9.4.2.323.4) for capability exchange — the EHT analogues of the HE fields from the Modern PHY track.
blocks.zh: 802.11be 定义了通告 BSS 的 EHT 参数的 EHT Operation 元素（9.4.2.321），以及用于能力交换的 Supported EHT-MCS And NSS Set 字段（9.4.2.323.4）——它们是“现代物理层”轨道中 HE 字段的 EHT 对应物。

cites.note: EHT Operation element; Supported EHT-MCS And NSS Set
